problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
hypothesis: Magnetohydrodynamic flow without moving parts may resolve Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
